title: Array Technologies Inc (NASDAQ:ARRY) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text:
Array Technologies Q1 2024 Earnings Summary

Financial Performance:

Revenue & Margins:
Array Technologies generated $153 million in Q1 2024 revenue, slightly exceeding guidance. The company achieved adjusted gross margins of 38.3%, which expanded significantly from prior year periods. Excluding a one-time $4 million benefit, margins were 35.7%, demonstrating operational improvements despite lower volume.

Cash Position:
The company generated $45.1 million in free cash flow and ended the quarter with $288 million in cash. Total available liquidity reached approximately $465 million when including undrawn credit facility capacity.

Business Highlights:

Order Book Strength:
Kevin Hostetler, CEO, noted the company booked approximately $400 million of new business with a quarter-end order book of $2.1 billion and a book-to-bill ratio exceeding 2.5 times. Approximately 80% of new orders came from Tier 1 customers.

Product Innovation:
Array launched Hail Alert Response software designed to autonomously protect solar assets during severe weather events. The company also introduced an enhanced H250 product incorporating features from its DuraTrack offering.

2024 Outlook:
Management affirmed full-year guidance of $1.25-$1.4 billion in revenue with adjusted EBITDA between $285-$315 million. The company expects revenue to be back-half weighted, with Q2 projected between $225-$235 million.

Risk Factor:
The recent anti-dumping/countervailing duty petition created uncertainty, though management noted customers are exploring mitigation strategies.
